windows.title: Spok — Live Harness for Grok Build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'

bundle.longDescription: Spok is a desktop harness for Grok Build with live thinking traces, repo diffs, durable sessions, and a hardened local privilege boundary.
